case_title: APOYO FINANCIERO INC. VS. MANUEL DE JESUS CHAN PERAZA

STIPULATION FOR JUDGE PRO TEM FILED BY PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF APOYO FINANCIERO INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PERAZA, MANUEL DE JESUS CHAN $1,434.50 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,504.50, DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM IS SUBSTANTIATED. SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DECEMBER 21, 2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DECEMBER 21, 2015. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY, NO EXHIBITS DETAINED BY THE COURT. JPT DAVID LAVINE, CLERK S. RAVINANTAPRICHA. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-21-2015 - JUDGMENT.
